DECLARATION REQUESTING TO RESCHEDULE COURT DATE

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ONTIVEROS, JOSE IND & DBA DINO'S HOUSE OF PRODUCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCADO LATINO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONTIVEROS, JOSE IND & DBA DINO'S HOUSE OF PRODUCE $3,545.61 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,610.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS SENT TO THE ACCOUNTANT.
